Best Hotels in Athens with a Pool

Compare Athens pool hotels by area, price signal, rooftop/view overlap, and what kind of pool access to confirm.

Quick answer

Pool hotels in central Athens skew premium, so compare the pool type before comparing the rate.

A rooftop pool, spa pool, seasonal outdoor pool, and pool-day-pass situation are different decisions. This page only uses hotels with pool signals in the dataset.

Compare hotels How to choose Booking checks FAQs

This table uses visible Hotels of Athens data: neighborhood, price signal, star category, Acropolis-view flag, rooftop-bar flag, amenities, and traveler-fit tags.

How to Choose

Best view overlap

Electra Palace Athens and St. George Lycabettus are useful starting points when pool, premium stay, and view context all matter.

Best central luxury overlap

Syntagma and Plaka are stronger than outer areas if sightseeing still matters.

Confirm the details

Pool season, guest access, hours, renovation closures, and whether children can use the pool can all change.

Area Fit for This Search

Plaka

Charming pedestrian streets beneath the Acropolis with neoclassical architecture, traditional tavernas, and ancient ruins around every corner. The oldest neighborhood in Athens.

Best for
First-timers, Couples, History buffs
Price signal
from €280
Acropolis
5-10 min
Signals
1 view / 1 rooftop

Syntagma

Athens' main square, home to the Parliament building and changing of the guard. Excellent metro connections and upscale shopping on Ermou Street.

Best for
Business travelers, Luxury seekers, First-timers
Price signal
from €450
Acropolis
12-15 min
Signals
1 view / 1 rooftop

Kolonaki

Athens' most fashionable neighborhood with designer boutiques, art galleries, and sophisticated cafes. At the foot of Lycabettus Hill.

Best for
Luxury travelers, Shoppers, Art lovers
Price signal
from €250
Acropolis
15-20 min
Signals
1 view / 1 rooftop

Source and Selection Notes

Hotels are included when their Hotels of Athens fields match this page’s criteria. The page does not use unsupported review scores or invented live availability. Treat prices as directional signals and confirm live rates, room type, cancellation terms, access rules, and views before booking.

Plaka hotelsSyntagma hotelsKolonaki hotels

Booking Checks That Actually Matter

Use these checks before treating any hotel-level signal as a finished booking decision.

✓

Confirm the exact room type, not only the hotel-level feature.

✓

Check whether breakfast, taxes, cancellation, and city fees change the final value.

✓

Verify the walking route or transfer time for the specific address.

✓

If a view, rooftop, pool, or ferry connection matters, confirm the access rules for your dates.

FAQs: Best Hotels in Athens with a Pool

Do many Athens hotels have pools?

No. In this dataset, pool signals are concentrated in a smaller premium set.

Are Athens pool hotels expensive?

They often skew upscale or luxury, though live rates vary by date.

Is a rooftop pool the same as a hotel pool?

No. Confirm whether the pool is rooftop, indoor, outdoor, seasonal, spa-only, or guest-only.
